question: [File: 'File Name: rest-java/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/restjava/service/HookService.java -> Scope: High: Any impacts caused by Tampering with submitted transactions'] [Function: getHookStorage(HookStorageRequest)] Can an unprivileged user tamper with a submitted transaction to set the hookId in HookStorageRequest to a hookId owned by a victim, causing getHookStorage() to return the victim's storage entries because there is no ownership check between the ownerId and the hookId in the query?
